WHY $PFINE ?

// No fees
YOUR WALLET.
YOUR MONEY.

We don't take a cut. 0% dev tax on buys and sells. No hidden fees, no sneaky percentages skimmed off the top. Every token you buy stays yours — except the ones the market takes. But that's fine.

// No rug
STAY ZEN.
NO RUG.

Once $PFINE graduates, liquidity is burned automatically by Pump.fun. Nobody can pull the rug. Not us. Not anyone. The only thing that can crash $PFINE is the market itself. And as we know — this is fine.

// Fair launch
EVERYONE
STARTS EQUAL.

No presale. No VC allocation. No insider wallets. Every single holder bought at the same price through the bonding curve. The playing field is as flat as Pepe's expression when the charts go green.

TOKENOMICS

1B
Total Supply
Fixed at 1 billion tokens. No minting. No inflation. What you see is what exists.
0%
Dev Tax
Zero dev tax on buys and sells. Pump.fun applies a standard 1% platform fee on all trades.

LP Burned
Liquidity burned automatically at graduation. No manual rug possible after that point.
100%
Fair Launch
No presale, no private allocation. Everyone buys through the same bonding curve.

HOW TO BUY

01

Get a Solana Wallet

Download Phantom or Solflare. Create your wallet and back up your seed phrase. Never share it with anyone.

02

Buy Some SOL

Purchase SOL on any major exchange (Binance, Coinbase, Kraken) and transfer it to your Phantom wallet.

03

Go to Pump.fun

Visit pump.fun and search for $PFINE. Always verify the contract address from our official Twitter.

04

Buy & Relax

Swap your SOL for $PFINE. Watch the charts. Sip your coffee. This is fine.
